languages.text: "Лорд-капитан?.. Слу-у-жу династии!" {n}Аугментированная ладонь врезается в грудной имплант с неприятным лязганьем в воинском приветствии. Человек замирает, словно застрял — по всему телу пробегают мучительные судроги, а из уголка рта стекает струйка крови.{/n} "Это к-к-кара? Мне не разрешено по... погибать? Я не убоюсь! Перина и саван..."

"The Lord Captain...? I serrrve the dynasty!" {n}With an unpleasant clang, the man slams his augmented hand into his chest implant in a military salute. He freezes, like a stalled machine man — then an agonising shudder runs through his entire body, and blood trickles from the corner of his mouth.{/n} "Is this a p-p-punishment? Am I not permitted to... to die? I will not fear! Eiderdown and shroud..."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан?.. Слу-у-жу династии!" {n}Аугментированная ладонь врезается в грудной имплант с неприятным лязганьем в воинском приветствии. Перина и саван..."

Am I not permitted to... to die? I will not fear! Eiderdown and shroud..."

languages.text: 「主の隊長様...? 私は王朝に仕える！」{n}不快な金属音と共に、その男は強化された手を胸のインプラントに叩きつけ、軍礼をする。彼は機械のように動きを止めるが、全身に激痛が走ると同時に、口の角から血が零れる。{/n}「これは罰か...? 死ぬこと...許されないのか？ 恐れるものはない！ 羽毛布団と死装束...」
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain...? I serrrve the dynasty!" {n}With an unpleasant clang, the man slams his augmented hand into his chest implant in a military salute. He freezes, like a stalled machine man — then an agonising shudder runs through his entire body, and blood trickles from the corner of his mouth.{/n} "Is this a p-p-punishment? Am I not permitted to... to die? I will not fear! Eiderdown and shroud..."

traits.locale_text: 「主の隊長様...? 私は王朝に仕える！」{n}不快な金属音と共に、その男は強化された手を胸のインプラントに叩きつけ、軍礼をする。彼は機械のように動きを止めるが、全身に激痛が走ると同時に、口の角から血が零れる。{n}「これは罰か...? 死ぬこと...許されないのか？ 恐れるものはない！ 羽毛布団と死装束...」

languages.text: “舰长大人……？我为王朝效命！”{n}伴随着一记刺耳的金属声，眼前的男人将改造过的手猛砸在胸部的植入物上，行了一个军礼。他僵住了，像一个卡死的机械人——随即全身剧烈痉挛，鲜血从他的嘴角渗出。{/n}“这是惩……惩罚吗？我不被允许……死吗？我无所畏惧！床褥与裹尸布……”
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain...? I serrrve the dynasty!" {n}With an unpleasant clang, the man slams his augmented hand into his chest implant in a military salute. He freezes, like a stalled machine man — then an agonising shudder runs through his entire body, and blood trickles from the corner of his mouth.{/n} "Is this a p-p-punishment? Am I not permitted to... to die? I will not fear! Eiderdown and shroud..."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人……？我为王朝效命！”{n}伴随着一记刺耳的金属声，眼前的男人将改造过的手猛砸在胸部的植入物上，行了一个军礼。他僵住了，像一个卡死的机械人——随即全身剧烈痉挛，鲜血从他的嘴角渗出。{/n}“这是惩……惩罚吗？我不被允许……死吗？我无所畏惧！床褥与裹尸布……”

languages.text: « {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine}... ? Je suis au serrrvice de la dynastie ! » {n}Un claquement métallique désagréable retentit lorsque l'homme vous adresse un salut militaire en frappant l'implant de son torse avec sa main augmentée. Il se fige soudain, comme un robot qui aurait brusquement cessé de fonctionner, puis un frisson de douleur parcourt son corps, et un filet de sang s'écoule d'un coin de sa bouche.{/n} « Est-ce une s-s-sanction ? Ne suis-je pas autorisé à... à mourir ? Je n'aurai pas peur ! Duvet et linceul... »
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain...? I serrrve the dynasty!" {n}With an unpleasant clang, the man slams his augmented hand into his chest implant in a military salute. He freezes, like a stalled machine man — then an agonising shudder runs through his entire body, and blood trickles from the corner of his mouth.{/n} "Is this a p-p-punishment? Am I not permitted to... to die? I will not fear! Eiderdown and shroud..."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine}... ? Je suis au serrrvice de la dynastie ! » {n}Un claquement métallique désagréable retentit lorsque l'homme vous adresse un salut militaire en frappant l'implant de son torse avec sa main augmentée. Il se fige soudain, comme un robot qui aurait brusquement cessé de fonctionner, puis un frisson de douleur parcourt son corps, et un filet de sang s'écoule d'un coin de sa bouche.{/n} « Est-ce une s-s-sanction ? Ne suis-je pas autorisé à... à mourir ? Je n'aurai pas peur ! Duvet et linceul... »

languages.text: «¿{mf|El|La} Lord Capitán...? ¡Sirrrvo a la dinastía!». {n}Con un desagradable sonido metálico, el hombre golpea el implante de su pecho con su mano aumentada en un saludo militar. Se queda inmóvil, como un hombre máquina atascado... y después un escalofrío agonizante recorre todo su cuerpo y un hilillo de sangre surge de la comisura de sus labios.{/n} «¿Es esto un c-c-castigo? ¿No se me permite... morir? ¡No temeré! Edredón y velo...».
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain...? I serrrve the dynasty!" {n}With an unpleasant clang, the man slams his augmented hand into his chest implant in a military salute. He freezes, like a stalled machine man — then an agonising shudder runs through his entire body, and blood trickles from the corner of his mouth.{/n} "Is this a p-p-punishment? Am I not permitted to... to die? I will not fear! Eiderdown and shroud..."

traits.locale_text: «¿{mf|El|La} Lord Capitán...? ¡Sirrrvo a la dinastía!». {n}Con un desagradable sonido metálico, el hombre golpea el implante de su pecho con su mano aumentada en un saludo militar. Se queda inmóvil, como un hombre máquina atascado... y después un escalofrío agonizante recorre todo su cuerpo y un hilillo de sangre surge de la comisura de sus labios.{/n} «¿Es esto un c-c-castigo? ¿No se me permite... morir? ¡No temeré! Edredón y velo...».

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan... Hanedanlığa hizmettt ediyorum!" {n}Adam, rahatsız edici bir çınlama eşliğinde ogmentli elini askerî bir selamla göğüs implantına çarpıyor. Duraksamış bir makine adam gibi donakalıyor, ardından tüm vücudu ızdırap içinde titriyor ve ağzının kenarından kan sızıyor.{/n} "Bu bir c... Ceza mı? Ölmeme... Ölmeme izin yok mu? Korkmayacağım! Yorgan ve kefen..."
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain...? I serrrve the dynasty!" {n}With an unpleasant clang, the man slams his augmented hand into his chest implant in a military salute. He freezes, like a stalled machine man — then an agonising shudder runs through his entire body, and blood trickles from the corner of his mouth.{/n} "Is this a p-p-punishment? Am I not permitted to... to die? I will not fear! Eiderdown and shroud..."

Duraksamış bir makine adam gibi donakalıyor, ardından tüm vücudu ızdırap içinde titriyor ve ağzının kenarından kan sızıyor.{/n} "Bu bir c... Ceza mı? Ölmeme... Ölmeme izin yok mu? Korkmayacağım! Yorgan ve kefen..."

languages.text: "Der Lord Captain ...? Ich diene derrrr Dynastie!" {n}Mit einem unangenehmen Scheppern schlägt der Mann seine augmentierte Hand gegen sein Brustimplantat, um vor dir zu salutieren. Dann erstarrt er wie ein defekter Maschinenmensch ... ehe ein quälender Schauer seinen ganzen Leib erbeben lässt und Blut aus seinem Mundwinkel sickert.{/n} "Ist das eine B-B-Bestrafung? Darf ich nicht ... sterben? Ich fürchte mich nicht! Daunenbett und Grabtuch ..."
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain...? I serrrve the dynasty!" {n}With an unpleasant clang, the man slams his augmented hand into his chest implant in a military salute. He freezes, like a stalled machine man — then an agonising shudder runs through his entire body, and blood trickles from the corner of his mouth.{/n} "Is this a p-p-punishment? Am I not permitted to... to die? I will not fear! Eiderdown and shroud..."
